tier1_official.name: HuggingFace Blog
tier1_official.rationale: Open-source LLM hub; BLOOM/StarCoder/SmolLM/OLMo/Zephyr first-publish here

tier1_official.name: Meta AI Blog
tier1_official.rationale: LLaMA series + OPT + BLOOM collaboration; open and detail-rich

tier1_official.name: AllenAI Blog
tier1_official.rationale: OLMo: only fully-open Western pretraining recipe

tier1_official.name: DeepSeek API News
tier1_official.rationale: DeepSeek-V2/V3/MoE/Coder; CN lab with most detail

tier1_official.name: Qwen Blog
tier1_official.rationale: Qwen2/2.5/3 series; full tech reports per release

tier2_official.name: xAI Blog
tier2_official.rationale: Grok 1/2/3 release notes and technical posts

tier2_official.name: Stability AI News
tier2_official.rationale: StableLM and related open-weight model announcements

tier2_official.name: 01.AI / Yi Releases
tier2_official.rationale: Yi series tech reports and weight releases

tier2_official.name: Zhipu AI / GLM (THUDM)
tier2_official.rationale: GLM-4/ChatGLM open-weight releases and tech reports

tier3_curated.name: Lil'Log (Lilian Weng)
tier3_curated.rationale: Systematic deep blogs (Transformer Family, Attention Mechanisms, LLM Agents); citation-grade

tier3_curated.name: Sebastian Raschka (Ahead of AI)
tier3_curated.rationale: Academic-background engineering blog; scaling/PEFT/quantization deep dives

tier3_curated.name: Eugene Yan
tier3_curated.rationale: Applied ML perspective; complements academic papers

tier3_curated.name: Nathan Lambert (Interconnects)
tier3_curated.rationale: OLMo collaborator; deep model release analyses

_excluded_with_reason.Simon Willison: AI product reviews / general commentary; less pretraining detail
_excluded_with_reason.Ben Recht (argmin.net): ML theory; doesn't cover model details
_excluded_with_reason.Chip Huyen: ML platforms / MLOps; not model internals
_excluded_with_reason.MiniMax / Baichuan blogs: Inconsistent blog presence; model cards on HuggingFace (Tier 1) cover them
